title: Building a Family Legacy Through Wellness, Community, and Purpose-Driv – Zen Rojas
meta_description: For Ashley and Jesse Rojas, business growth is about far more than expansion — it’s about creating a lasting impact rooted in family, service, and shared values. As parents and entrepreneurs, they are intentionally building a legacy centered on resilience, wellness, and meaningful relationships, both within their family and throughout their community. Through Zen Rojas, they aim to foster genuine connections, support healthier lifestyles, and inspire future generations to lead with compassion, purpose, and a commitment to continuous growth.
